mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_ContactCustomerStatistics (userid, stat_time, chat_cnt, message_cnt, avg_reply_time, reply_percentage, negative_feedback_cnt, new_apply_cnt, new_contact_cnt, createTime) VALUES
(#{item.userid}, #{item.statTime}, #{item.chatCnt}, #{item.messageCnt}, #{item.avgReplyTime}, #{item.replyPercentage}, #{item.negativeFeedbackCnt}, #{item.newApplyCnt}, #{item.newContactCnt}, GETDATE())
